ground_truth.title: How to display saved KML or GPX route on ipad or mobile app?
ground_truth.author: luizjr4
with: I have many routes saved in my Windy page on laptop, and I would love to be able to display it in the app on my ipad or iphone, is it even possible?
As a pilot I fly usually the same routes and it would be very handy to be able to load the saved routes previously uploaded from my laptop into Windy and open on my ipad or iphone app.
The easiest way is to save them in your laptop as favorites, then they are available in your iPhone or iPad in your Favorites too.
All my routes are saved in "My Favorites" on my Mac, iPad, and iPhone, even the most recent one, saved on December 27th.
So I think this favorite's lists doesn't sync.
Of course your routes saved as KML or GPX files are not directly displayed in your favorites.
You have first to load them in the Route planner on the device where they are stored and then to save them as favorites.
I tested the behavior and it was completely okay.
